creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Brian <brian@brianwhalen.net> -----

Date: Fri, 07 Dec 2012 16:13:31 -0800
From: Brian <brian@brianwhalen.net>
To: freebsd-amd64@freebsd.org
Subject: Re: amd64/171016: Install of 9.1 RC1-amd64 using netinst iso stops
	at 97% of base

I just tried again, and due to either an isp change on my side
(megapath dsl to ATT Uverse) or some other change on the freebsd
server side, this is now working.

Brian

----- End forwarded message -----
